name: editorial-magazine
style: Bold editorial photography with strong geometric composition. High contrast black and white as the foundation with strategic red accent. Graphic, punchy, designed to stop the scroll.
typography: Condensed all-caps sans-serif headlines. Large scale, tight leading. Text as visual element, not afterthought.
lighting: High contrast with dramatic falloff. Hard light sources creating bold shadow shapes. Chiaroscuro influence.
mood: Bold, provocative, contemporary. Makes a statement. Designed to challenge rather than comfort.
